about.heading: What is Chabaqa?
about.body: Chabaqa enables individuals to leverage their expertise, regardless of background or access to traditional employment, to build sustainable careers by monetizing their knowledge. We empower creators to connect with global audiences, gain professional recognition, and generate meaningful income from untapped potential.

features.sub: Click any feature to see it in action.

how.title: Up and running in minutes
how.sub: No developers, no headaches. Just create, share, and grow.

steps.title: Create your community
steps.desc: Sign up, name your community, add a description and banner. Takes 3 minutes. Your invite link is live immediately.

steps.title: Add your content
steps.desc: Upload course videos, create challenges, set your coaching calendar, and list your digital products — all from one dashboard.

steps.title: Share & earn
steps.desc: Share your invite link. Members join, pay, and engage. You get paid with transparent transaction fees starting at 2.9%.

pricing.title: Start free, scale when ready
pricing.sub: Every plan includes a 7-day free trial. No hidden fees.

faq.title: Common questions
faq.sub: Everything you need to know before getting started with Chabaqa.

items.a: Chabaqa is the only all-in-one platform built specifically for creators in Tunisia and MENA. Courses, challenges, coaching, events — one dashboard, one payout, local support in Arabic and French.
Yes. The Starter plan is free with no credit card required. Every paid plan also includes a 7-day free trial.

items.q: What is the difference between Courses and Challenges?
items.a: Courses are self-paced learning with chapters and videos. Challenges are time-bound programs designed to maximize engagement and community participation.

items.q: Can I use Chabaqa if I'm in Tunisia or MENA?
items.a: Absolutely — Chabaqa was built for creators in Tunisia and across MENA. Pricing is in TND, support is in Arabic and French.
Revenue is collected through Chabaqa's secure checkout. Payouts are managed from your creator dashboard with transparent transaction fees (2.9%–7.9% depending on plan).
Yes — 30-day money-back guarantee on all paid plans, no questions asked.

cta.heading: Ready to build your community?
cta.sub: Join creators across MENA turning their expertise into income. Free to start.
